context_assembly_persistence_available.postgresqlSql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'decisioning' AND table_name = 'context_assembly_contracts') AS is_available
context_assembly_persistence_available.sqlServerSql: SELECT CAST(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'decisioning' AND TABLE_NAME = 'context_assembly_contracts') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS is_available

context_assembly_contract_upsert.postgresqlSql: SELECT %s::jsonb AS contract, %s::jsonb AS fragments, %s::jsonb AS gate_decisions
context_assembly_contract_upsert.sqlServerSql: SELECT ? AS contract, ? AS fragments, ? AS gate_decisions

context_assembly_latest_projection.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.context_assembly_projections WHERE workflow_run_id = %s::uuid AND (%s::uuid IS NULL OR step_run_id = %s::uuid) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
context_assembly_latest_projection.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) * FROM decisioning.context_assembly_projections WHERE workflow_run_id = ? AND (? IS NULL OR step_run_id = ?) ORDER BY created_at DESC
